description: After drilling a well section, an engineer analyzes the performance of the drill bit to decide if it can be used again or should be replaced.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the drilling data for the section, including rate of penetration (ROP), weight on bit (WOB), and hours on the bit.

expected_outcome.expected: All relevant performance data for the bit run is compiled.

nodes.task_description: Input the dull grading code from the visual inspection of the bit after it was pulled out of the hole.

expected_outcome.expected: The bit's condition is logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: Compare the bit's performance and condition against benchmarks to make a run/pull/repair decision.

expected_outcome.expected: A recommendation is made to 'pull' the bit and replace it for the next section.
